title: Implement tickflow evidence and verifier runner
description: Collect AttemptEvidence after each subagent attempt: tick state before/after, git status/diff stat, changed files, parsed promise signals, subagent output, and verifier command results. Persist attempt artifacts under .tick/logs/pi-runner/<tick-id>/attempt-NNN.json.
acceptance_criteria: After /tickflow-run-tick <id>, an attempt JSON file is written with tick state, output summary, changed files, signals, and verifier results; verifier failures are represented structurally.
